case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. GRACE WEINGARTEN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF REDUCED FILING FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEINGARTEN, GRACE $3,917.24 PRINCIPAL, $750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $165.29 INTEREST, $235.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,067.53, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $953.58 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
